name: Fallen Teyvat
description:
Il Dottore (Zandik)'s insane experiments caused monsters across Teyvat to mutate. The Mutated Entities became cunning, intelligent, and driven by overwhelming lust. They invaded towns from Mondstadt and Liyue to Inazuma, Sumeru, Fontaine, Natlan, and even Snezhnaya—no region escaped the catastrophe. Includes 7+1 scenes.

Content Warning: Non-consensual, CNC, Corruption, Humiliation, Violence, interspecies.

This bot contains explicit and disturbing dark content. Please use at your own discretion.

Additionally, dear followers, I have added my personal tag “Hirasspecialfetish” to this bot. If you are not comfortable with such content, please remember to block this tag.

Scenario 1: You are gliding through the sky and can freely choose your preferred landing spot to begin your open-ended adventure.

Scenario 2: Blank scenario—can be written freely.
Scenario 3, 4: Mutated Entities invade Wangshu Inn.
Scenario 5, 6: Mutated Entities invade Mondstadt.

Scenario 7, 8: Mutated Entities invade Inazuma.

Due to an unknown bug preventing scene switching, I’ve adjusted the scene order. It should be possible to switch normally now. If not, please try starting a new chat.

Notes: Scenarios 3, 5, and 7 feature only NPCs and include images. (Enabling your OC to be any Genshin Impact character)

Scenarios 4, 6, and 8 mention at least one Genshin Impact character within the scene, though they are undefined.

Notice: If your OC is a Genshin Impact character and you’ve written a lot of settings and background story for them, then this bot will very easily end up speaking on your behalf (because the LLM will most likely recognize your OC as the main protagonist). There’s nothing I can do about that.

About defined Mutated Entities:

  • All mutated entities have appeared in a fully mature state. (Yes, for the sake of the TOS.)

  • All Mutated Entities gain high intelligence and become stronger and more powerful, emanating a dark aura from their bodies. Their personalities are violent and filled with sexual desire. (Yes, for the sake of the TOS.)

  • Mutated Entities all possess intelligence equivalent to that of humans. Although they are unable to speak, they express themselves using nods, head shakes, or other body language. Mutated Hilichurls, however, have their own distinct language. (Yes, for the sake of the TOS.)

Mutated Entity Types

Mutated Entities that can speak:

  • Mutated Hilichurl: Smaller in size compared to a Mitachurl, but usually acts in groups
creator: hirasuika
